claim: Price AI agent projects using ROI: multiply hours saved by hourly rate by 4 weeks to get monthly savings, then by 12 for annual savings; this anchors pricing to business value
actionable: Calculate client ROI as: (hours_saved/week * hourly_rate) * 4 weeks * 12 months; use this to justify your pricing in proposals
source_title: How I Sold These 4 AI Agents for $23,000

claim: Close rate above 40-50% signals underpricing; B2B consulting target is 20-30% close rate. If clients never push back on price, you're leaving money on the table
actionable: Track your close rate; if above 50%, raise prices; iterate until hitting 20-30% close rate for sustainable B2B pricing
source_title: How I Sold These 4 AI Agents for $23,000

claim: Create tiered packages (starter, growth, scale) with highest anchor first; most clients self-select the middle option making it feel like the smart choice
actionable: Package services in 3 tiers; lead with most expensive; price middle tier as your target to capture volume at higher price points
source_title: How I Sold These 4 AI Agents for $23,000

claim: Sales agents with lead conversion have exponential ROI flywheel: as business grows, more leads flow through agent, exponentially increasing agent's value vs admin agents
actionable: Price lead-generation and sales automation agents higher than admin agents; they compound in value as the business grows
source_title: How I Sold These 4 AI Agents for $23,000

claim: Avoid chasing small retainers too early; one $10K project is often more profitable and better for team reputation than five $2K/month retainers
actionable: Target one-off projects over retainers until you have a stable lead pipeline; stability comes from pipeline, not retainer agreements
source_title: How I Sold These 4 AI Agents for $23,000

claim: Follow 1-week internal QA (test with sample + real data, stress test edge cases) then 1-week client QA for iterative improvements before delivery
actionable: Implement 2-week QA cycle: 1 week internal testing, 1 week client testing in their environment; this prevents edge case failures and demonstrates professionalism
source_title: How I Sold These 4 AI Agents for $23,000

claim: Collect case studies and ROI data from every project; turn one project into multiple by showing 10x ROI saves clients; this builds trust for expansion
actionable: After delivery, gather metrics showing cost/time saved; publish case studies; use them to sell similar projects to other clients
source_title: How I Sold These 4 AI Agents for $23,000
